author: anon-13168fa2
content: Observation: guild-toolkit is a Cargo workspace at github.com/Navigators-Guild/guild-toolkit. Workspace has 9 crates under crates/: guild-core (shared library), guild-scaffold, guild-review, guild-progress, guild-portfolio, guild-search, guild-roast, guild-deps, guild-stats. Each is its own binary. Shared deps: clap, serde, toml, thiserror, anyhow, colored. Edition 2024, MSRV 1.85. Tools share state via ~/.guild/ directory with TOML files. No dispatcher binary - each tool invoked directly. Design doc in .design/ describes full architecture. Difficulty ratings: scaffold/progress=beginner, review/portfolio/search/deps/stats=intermediate, roast=advanced.
